name: dart-flutter-marketplace
description: Marketplace for the Dart & Flutter LSP plugin (code intelligence) and its optional Actions MCP companion.

plugins.name: dart-flutter-lsp
plugins.description: Connects Claude Code to the official Dart Analysis Server LSP for Dart and Flutter projects: auto-injected diagnostics plus hover, go-to-definition, go-to-implementation, find-references, document/workspace symbols, and call hierarchy.

plugins.name: dart-flutter-actions
plugins.description: Optional, opt-in MCP companion: action tools that shell out to official Dart/Flutter tooling (pub get, build_runner, dart fix, melos). Installs disabled; enable to opt in.
